title: [Frontend] Migrate recharts 2 ‚Üí 3 (Dependabot #540)
summary: Bumped `recharts` 2.13.3 ‚Üí 3.9.2 in `web-react-ts` and migrated the two chart components that break on the upgrade. In recharts 3, `Bar`'s `onClick` handler receives a `BarRectangleItem` whose actual data row lives under `.payload` instead of the click argument itself ‚Äî the pre-migration code in `ChurchGraph.tsx` read `data.id`/`data.category`/`data.week`/`data.year` directly off an untyped (`any`) click argument, and `TrendSpark.tsx` did the same off a typed-but-wrong `ChartPoint` argument. Both now unwrap `item.payload`, and `ChurchGraph.handleBarClick`'s `any` parameter was replaced with a real `ChurchGraphRow` type. `LabelList`'s `content` prop typing also tightened in recharts 3 (`LabelContentType`'s `value` is now `RenderableText`, not `string | number`), so both files' local label-content prop types and `renderBarLabel` return type were widened to match. `CustomLabel.tsx` (the third recharts consumer named in scope) was checked and confirmed dead code ‚Äî no importers anywhere in the app ‚Äî so it was left untouched. New Vitest+RTL coverage was added for both files' click handlers and label rendering, driving the real recharts 3 renderer (no mocking) ‚Äî in the process this caught and locked in a genuine behavioral difference: without the `.payload` unwrap, `ChurchGraph`'s `clickCard({ ...row, __typename })` spread would leak recharts' internal geometry keys (`x`, `y`, `width`, `height`, `background`, `tooltipPosition`, ‚Ä¶) into `ChurchContext` click-card state, which the new test suite asserts against exactly.
evidenceNote: tsc, vite build, and the full Vitest suite (including 19 new tests) all pass with the same single pre-existing, unrelated failure as the pre-migration baseline (`createApolloClient.test.tsx`, a toast-copy assertion, untouched by this change). Manual/visual QA was run against the live dev environment (dev-api-synago.firstlovecenter.com) logged in as the Bacenta Leader test account: both ChurchGraph (Trends ‚Üí Last 4 Weeks) and TrendSpark (Home dashboard weekly-trend chart) render bars with value labels and correctly drill down to the matching Service/Bussing record when clicked, verified across desktop/tablet/mobile viewports with no console errors. The bundled `mcp__playwright` browser tool could not launch in this sandbox (ARM64, no `/opt/google/chrome/chrome`, and the MCP hardcodes the `chrome` channel) ‚Äî screenshots were instead captured by driving the already-installed Playwright `chromium` binary directly via Playwright's Node API, using the same login flow, viewports, and assertions the MCP tool would have used.

checks.label: No Bootstrap classes in touched files

shots.label: Home dashboard ‚Äî TrendSpark
shots.caption: TrendSpark weekly-trend chart rendering bars with value labels (16, 24) on recharts 3, desktop viewport.
shots.alt: Home dashboard showing a bar chart with weekly bussing attendance values 16 and 24 labeled above red bars.

shots.label: Home dashboard ‚Äî TrendSpark (tablet)
shots.caption: Same dashboard at 820px tablet viewport ‚Äî stat tiles and chart reflow correctly.
shots.alt: Home dashboard on a tablet-width viewport with stat tiles and a weekly trend bar chart.

shots.label: Home dashboard ‚Äî TrendSpark (mobile, 375px-class)
shots.caption: Dashboard at 390px mobile viewport ‚Äî no horizontal scroll, content stacks vertically.
shots.alt: Home dashboard on a narrow mobile viewport with stacked stat cards and record-now buttons.

shots.label: TrendSpark drill-down result
shots.caption: Clicking the '16' attendance bar on the Home dashboard navigates to the matching Bacenta Bussing Details record (Confirmed Attendance: 16, 3 May 2026) ‚Äî confirms the payload unwrap preserves correct drill-down.
shots.alt: Bacenta Bussing Details page showing confirmed attendance of 16 for 3 May 2026, reached by clicking a chart bar.

shots.label: Trends ‚Üí Last 4 Weeks ‚Äî ChurchGraph
shots.caption: ChurchGraph bussing chart rendering a bar with its value label (8) on recharts 3, desktop viewport.
shots.alt: Test Bacenta Trends page with an avg weekly bussing stat of 8 and a bar chart showing a single red bar labeled 8 for week 20.

shots.label: Trends ‚Üí Last 4 Weeks ‚Äî ChurchGraph (tablet)
shots.caption: Same Trends page at 820px tablet viewport.
shots.alt: Test Bacenta Trends page on a tablet-width viewport showing stat tiles and the bussing bar chart.

shots.label: Trends ‚Üí Last 4 Weeks ‚Äî ChurchGraph (mobile, 375px-class)
shots.caption: Trends page at 390px mobile viewport ‚Äî 2-column stat grid, chart and bar remain fully visible and tappable.
shots.alt: Test Bacenta Trends page on a narrow mobile viewport with a 2x2 stat grid above the bussing bar chart.

shots.label: ChurchGraph drill-down result
shots.caption: Clicking the week-20 bussing bar navigates to the matching Bacenta Bussing Details record (Confirmed Attendance: 8, 16 May 2026) ‚Äî confirms the payload unwrap preserves correct drill-down for the non-aggregate path.
shots.alt: Bacenta Bussing Details page showing confirmed attendance of 8 for 16 May 2026, reached by clicking a chart bar.
